title: Eikonal Tomography with Fourier Neural Operators
venue: Caltech, CS 163: Projects in Machine Learning
abstract: Applied FNOs for seismic wave travel-time estimation, replacing PDE solvers; scalable training on 100GB datasets using GPU-accelerated HPC clusters

title: Using Multi-Modal Diffusion Models to Reconstruct Dark Matter Fields
venue: Caltech, CS 163: Projects in Machine Learning
abstract: Multi-modal diffusion framework that reconstructs dark matter density fields and estimates cosmological parameters, achieving strong fidelity that improves with better data quality.

title: ReAct-Based Semantic Wikipedia Scraper
abstract: Sub-agents for retrieval augmented generation. Improved answer accuracy and speed over baselines.

title: AI Diagnostician
abstract: Trained large vision models to predict pathologies from "CheXpert" chest X-rays.
